scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=api" "npm run dev --workspace=web" "cd apps/python-service && python app.py"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=api" "npm run start --workspace=web" "cd apps/python-service && python app.py"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=api && npm run test --workspace=web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --workspace=api && npm run test:coverage --workspace=web
